title: Grannell
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Grannell''' was a [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and one of the pilots who flew escort for the ''[[Tampion]]'' before its capture by the [[Yevetha]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
